notes_for_consumers: Operative product source on every cell. Trim SKUs, hex colors, and camera angles map directly into Substance rows for the CG/AI pipeline cell type. The claims hierarchy is priority order: when a script direction supports multiple claims, lead with the higher-priority claim. JD Power VDS dependability is the deliberate lead claim across 2026. Disclaimer language is verbatim where supplied; fall back to 'See dealer for details' when unsure. Do NOT emphasize the Hurricane I6 cylinder count. Render the mandatory sponsor sign-off exactly when the script directs it.

nameplate_hierarchy.Ram 1500: LD volume hero. Trims: Tradesman (base), Big Horn, Laramie, Limited, Longhorn, Tungsten, TRX, RHO, Black Express.
nameplate_hierarchy.Ram 2500: HD. Power Wagon, Power Wagon Diesel (PWD), Laramie, Limited, Black Express.

content.hex_note: Demo set, not the complete RAM palette. Production work pulls the current model-year color list from the brand book.

camera_angle_notes.hero_front: front-on hero shot, static or slow motion
camera_angle_notes.front_TBD: placeholder for new angle ([NEW] tag in demo set)

claims_hierarchy.claim: America's Most Dependable Full-Size Truck — J.D. Power.
claims_hierarchy.source: 2026 U.S. Vehicle Dependability Study, Ram 1500 ranked #1 in large light-duty pickup segment.
claims_hierarchy.disclaimer: Based on 33,268 original owners of 2023 MY vehicles after 3 years.
claims_hierarchy.note: LEAD claim for any quality-adjacent moment. Football Brief: do NOT minimize this.

claims_hierarchy.claim: America's Most Powerful Lineup of Full-Size Light-Duty Gas Production Trucks.
America's Best Powertrain Limited Warranty — 10 yr / 100,000 mi.
claims_hierarchy.disclaimer: Powertrain Limited Warranty on 2026 models. Excludes [list]. See Powertrain Limited Warranty for details.
claims_hierarchy.note: Must be in creative concepts in some capacity.
HEMI return is the central 'Ramdemption' beat. Lead for any HEMI-focused moment.

legal_disclaimers: Based on 33,268 original owners of 2023 MY vehicles after 3 years.
Powertrain Limited Warranty on 2026 models. Excludes [list]. See Powertrain Limited Warranty for details.
content.mandatory_sponsor_signoff: Sponsored by Ram trucks. Nothing Stops Ram.
content.hurricane_cylinder_rule: Do not emphasize the Hurricane I6's six-cylinder count in supers, copy, or descriptive language. Refer to 'Hurricane' or specific output figures (horsepower, torque).
brand_truths: Powertrain breadth — HEMI V8, Cummins Turbo Diesel, Hurricane I6. 'Your Choice, Our Power.'
Ride and handling — multiple suspension options, coil-link/air rear.
Luxury interior — incomparable interiors, comfortable ride.
Diesel and HD leadership — long-standing positioning.
